name_en: ✔️ MiuMiu New Briefcase 5BB117: This year's major brands adopt this fashionable element, new suede leather, hot all over the internet, canvas lining. This bag is very cool, freezing a refined multi-functional design, blending men's and women's elements, casual and lazy, natural and free, full of personality. Extra-large capacity and lightweight, simple but not plain, almost everyone has one. Size: 34X23X12cm
